executive_summary: Author six venture-intake gates G1-G6 as OBSERVE-ONLY criteria composing onto the verified-live venture-pipeline substrate (GATE-BAR-REGIME lib/eva/gate-bars.js bars on S3/S5/S23/S25; STAGE-REVIVAL-PLUMBING lib/discovery/intake-bar.js Stage-1 intake bar). The pack installs a hard-problems/defensibility screen that protects the income pipeline from the estate's research-only/content-gravity bias (R3), WITHOUT blocking the first venture (off the critical path — venture #1 is selected by chairman judgment via the existing Stage Zero conductChairmanReview path; the pack only records observations). Each gate EVALUATES and RECORDS a verdict to governance_audit_log (the gate-bars precedent — no schema change, no eva_stage_gate_results constraint conflict) but NEVER blocks/kills/promotes while observe-only. The pack carries its OWN binding seam isPackBinding(cohortSize>=3) — independent of GATE_BARS_OBSERVE_ONLY — and stays observe-only until a >=3-run calibration cohort exists (currently 0 completed venture runs; one venture is a cohort of one). The binding enforcement path is authored-but-DORMANT (guarded behind isPackBinding, never enabled this SD). Criteria are v1-unratified (chairman ratifies/amends after calibrating against the first live venture), matching intake-bar.js's established 'v1-unratified' pattern. None of the Group-B criteria #0/#4/#5/#6/#7/#18 exist anywhere today (verified by full-repo search), so each is authored exactly once — no #4 Distribution-Channel-First double-placement.

functional_requirements.title: Author G1-G6 as pure observe-only criterion evaluators (single canonical authorship)
functional_requirements.description: Create one canonical module lib/eva/venture-intake-gates.js exporting six pure evaluators, each defined EXACTLY ONCE, each returning a bar object { gate, pass, status: 'pass'|'fail'|'unverified', detail, observe_only: true, bar_version: 'v1-unratified' } (mirrors evaluateGateBars/evaluateIntakeBar). G1 Distribution-Channel-First (#4): a primary distribution channel is identified before build. G2 Quantified PMF (#5): a quantified product-market-fit signal exists (numeric demand/retention/conversion evidence, not vibes). G3 Timing/Why-Now (#7): a falsifiable why-now/timing thesis is present. G4 Transactional Validation (#6): evidence of transactional (paid/committed) validation, not just interest. G5 Non-Commodity Moat (#18): a declared non-commodity moat/defensibility beyond execution speed. G6 Option-B Monetization-Shape Filter (#0): the monetization shape matches an acceptable Option-B pattern. Evaluators are pure (fail-open per-criterion like evaluateIntakeBar) EXCEPT any that need DB data, which take injected resolvers.
acceptance_criteria: all six gates authored exactly once in lib/eva/venture-intake-gates.js (single canonical definition; grep/assert no duplicate of #4/G1)
each returns a structured observe-only bar object with observe_only:true and bar_version:'v1-unratified'
evaluators are pure / fail-open per criterion (an evaluation error degrades that one criterion, never throws)

functional_requirements.title: Independent observe-only seam + dormant binding trigger
functional_requirements.description: Export INTAKE_GATES_OBSERVE_ONLY=true and isPackBinding(cohortSize) => cohortSize >= 3 (the >=3-run cohort trigger), INDEPENDENT of gate-bars.js GATE_BARS_OBSERVE_ONLY (Flag B). The pack records observations but emits NO KILL/promotion/blocking verdict while INTAKE_GATES_OBSERVE_ONLY is true OR isPackBinding(cohort) is false. The actual binding-enforcement branch is authored-but-DORMANT (guarded; never reached this SD because INTAKE_GATES_OBSERVE_ONLY=true and cohort<3). Honest deferral: implement the trigger predicate + evaluation + recording; do NOT wire real blocking (per SD scope 'DOES NOT flip bars to binding before the >=3-run cohort').
acceptance_criteria: INTAKE_GATES_OBSERVE_ONLY and isPackBinding are exported and independent of GATE_BARS_OBSERVE_ONLY
with observe-only true OR cohort<3, the pack returns only observe-only verdicts (no KILL/promotion/blocking)
the binding branch is dormant/guarded and unreachable while observe-only (verified by test: forcing isPackBinding true while INTAKE_GATES_OBSERVE_ONLY true still does not block)

functional_requirements.title: Compose onto the substrate (no replacement, record via governance_audit_log)
functional_requirements.description: Wire G1/G3/G4 onto S3 and G2 onto S23+S25 by appending their bars inside lib/eva/gate-bars.js evaluateGateBars (for stages already in CHAIRMAN_GATE_STAGES = {3,5,10,13,17,18,23,24,25}); APPEND to the bars array — do NOT replace existing bars. Wire G5 as the Stage-1 intake bar's 8th criterion (lib/discovery/intake-bar.js CHECKS[7]) and G6 as an intake-bar filter, importing the canonical definitions from venture-intake-gates.js (single authorship — intake-bar.js calls into the module, does not redefine). Record observations to governance_audit_log with namespaced changed_by='venture-intake-gates' + change_reason='intake_gate_observation (SD-LEO-INFRA-VENTURE-INTAKE-GATE-PACK-001, observe-only)' (the gate-bars precedent) — NO new table/column/migration, sidestepping the eva_stage_gate_results unique-index + gate_type CHECK constraint.
acceptance_criteria: G1/G3/G4 appended to S3 bars, G2 appended to S23+S25 bars in evaluateGateBars (existing bars still fire — verified by integration test)
G5 added as intake-bar CHECKS[7] (8th criterion) and G6 as an intake-bar filter, both importing the canonical definition from venture-intake-gates.js (no duplicate definition)
observations recorded to governance_audit_log via the namespaced changed_by/change_reason; no schema change

functional_requirements.title: Cohort trigger: count calibration-eligible completed venture runs
functional_requirements.description: Export getCompletedVentureRunCount(supabase) that counts DISTINCT calibration-eligible ventures that completed the pipeline (stage 26 work stage_status='completed', or stage_events STAGE_COMPLETE at stage 26), applying the isCalibrationEligibleVenture filter (exclude metadata.venture_classification='workflow_scaffold' — Flag D). isPackBinding(n)=>n>=3 consumes it. The count is computed at evaluation time (no pre-computed scalar exists — Flag C); inject it as getCohortSize where a gate needs it. Currently returns 0 (cohort 1 active).
acceptance_criteria: getCompletedVentureRunCount excludes workflow_scaffold ventures (isCalibrationEligibleVenture filter)
isPackBinding returns false for n=1 and n=2, true for n=3 (unit-tested)
the count is injected (resolver pattern), keeping the gate evaluators otherwise pure

functional_requirements.title: Venture #1 is demonstrably NOT blocked; selection path documented
functional_requirements.description: Because the pack is observe-only (records, never blocks/kills/promotes), the first venture's build is inherently unblocked. Add an integration test asserting that when a venture passes through S3/S5/S23/S25 + the Stage-1 intake bar, the pack EVALUATES + RECORDS all six gates but emits NO verdict that changes advancement (no KILL, no promotion, no blocking row). Document (in the module header + a short docs note) that venture #1 selection is the chairman's manual judgment off the pipeline via the existing Stage Zero conductChairmanReview path — NO new checklist UX is authored (out of scope; the pick stays deferred).
acceptance_criteria: integration test: pack evaluates at S3/S5/S23/S25 + intake bar and does NOT block/kill/promote any venture (advancement unaffected)
module header + docs note name the chairman-judgment / Stage Zero selection path for venture #1 (off critical path)
no new gate added to advance_venture_stage() kill/promotion arrays or the JS hardcoded sets

functional_requirements.title: Tests + single-canonical-definition guard
functional_requirements.description: Unit tests per gate (a pass case + a fail case each), a cohort-trigger unit test (n=1/2/3 -> observe-only/observe-only/eligible-to-bind), a single-canonical-definition test asserting criterion #4 (G1 Distribution-Channel-First) is defined exactly once (grep/import-count, no Phase-1 doctrine duplicate), and an integration test verifying composition (existing GATE-BAR-REGIME bars + intake-bar 7 criteria STILL fire alongside the appended intake gates; nothing blocks).
acceptance_criteria: per-gate unit tests (pass+fail) for G1-G6
cohort-trigger unit test pins the >=3 flip
single-canonical-#4 test passes (exactly one G1 definition)
integration test confirms compose-not-replace + observe-only (no blocking)

technical_requirements.title: Reuse the observe-only substrate
technical_requirements.description: Record via governance_audit_log (gate-bars.js recordGateBarObservation precedent, namespaced changed_by/change_reason) — NOT eva_stage_gate_results (3-col unique index + gate_type CHECK 'entry'/'exit'/'kill' would conflict for multiple per-stage gates). No new table/column/migration. venture_stages is read-only (deny_write RLS) — do not mutate it.

technical_requirements.title: Independent binding seam
technical_requirements.description: INTAKE_GATES_OBSERVE_ONLY is a separate constant from GATE_BARS_OBSERVE_ONLY so the pack's observe-only->binding flip is decoupled from the gate-bars regime flip. Binding enforcement is authored-but-dormant (guarded), never enabled this SD.

technical_requirements.title: Authority + out of scope
technical_requirements.description: Use stage-governance.js (DB-backed) as the gate-set authority; do NOT add to the hardcoded JS sets in stage-gates.js or to advance_venture_stage() gate arrays. Do NOT author a new venture-#1 checklist UX, do NOT select/rank ventures, do NOT flip to binding, do NOT change the no-auto-override doctrine (gates remain chairman-overridable only).

test_scenarios.scenario: A venture passes S3/S5/S23/S25 + intake bar; pack evaluates + records but does not block
test_scenarios.expected: six observe-only verdicts recorded to governance_audit_log; advancement unaffected; existing gate-bars + intake-bar criteria still fire
isPackBinding false, false, true; pack stays observe-only for cohort<3
exactly one G1 Distribution-Channel-First definition (no duplicate / Phase-1 doctrine double-placement)
each gate returns pass on a satisfying context and fail (observe-only, non-blocking) on a violating context

acceptance_criteria: G1-G6 authored and wired as observe-only criteria onto S3/S5/S23/S25 + the Stage-1 intake bar, each composing with (not replacing) the existing GATE-BAR-REGIME / STAGE-REVIVAL-PLUMBING substrate (integration test)
Criterion #4 (G1) authored exactly ONCE here, not duplicated as Phase-1 doctrine (single canonical definition test)
The first venture's build is demonstrably NOT blocked by the pack (observe-only; chairman-judgment/Stage-Zero selection path documented)
>=3-run cohort trigger defined + unit-tested; pack stays observe-only until cohort>=3; binding path authored-but-dormant
Observations recorded with no schema change (governance_audit_log precedent); adversarial review of observe-only/compose-not-replace/cohort-trigger/dormant-binding clean

risks.risk: A gate accidentally blocks/kills venture #1 (on critical path)
risks.mitigation: INTAKE_GATES_OBSERVE_ONLY=true + isPackBinding(cohort<3)=false make the binding branch unreachable; integration test asserts no advancement change
single canonical definition in venture-intake-gates.js + a unit test asserting exactly one definition; full-repo search confirmed none pre-exist

risks.risk: Gates replace rather than compose, regressing GATE-BAR-REGIME / intake-bar
risks.mitigation: APPEND to evaluateGateBars bars array + add intake CHECKS[7]; integration test verifies existing bars/criteria still fire

risks.risk: Premature binding on a thin single-venture cohort
risks.mitigation: >=3-run cohort trigger (calibration-eligible, workflow_scaffold excluded); binding dormant until then

system_architecture.summary: One new canonical module (lib/eva/venture-intake-gates.js) holding G1-G6 pure evaluators + the independent observe-only seam + the cohort trigger, composed onto two existing substrates (gate-bars.js evaluateGateBars for S3/S5/S23/S25; intake-bar.js CHECKS for the Stage-1 intake bar) via append/import, recording observations to governance_audit_log. No schema change; binding enforcement authored-but-dormant.

components.name: lib/eva/venture-intake-gates.js
components.change: NEW: G1-G6 evaluators (single canonical), INTAKE_GATES_OBSERVE_ONLY, isPackBinding, getCompletedVentureRunCount, record-to-governance_audit_log helper (FR-1/2/4)

components.name: lib/eva/gate-bars.js
components.change: MODIFY: append intake-gate bars for S3 (G1/G3/G4) and S23/S25 (G2) inside evaluateGateBars (FR-3)

components.name: lib/discovery/intake-bar.js
components.change: MODIFY: add G5 as CHECKS[7] (8th criterion) + G6 filter, importing canonical defs from venture-intake-gates.js (FR-3)

components.name: tests/unit/eva/venture-intake-gates.test.js
components.change: NEW: per-gate pass/fail, cohort trigger, single-canonical-#4 (FR-6)

implementation_approach.summary: Author the six gates once in a new canonical module with an independent observe-only seam and a dormant >=3-cohort binding trigger; compose onto gate-bars.js (append S3/S23/S25 bars) and intake-bar.js (8th criterion + filter) by importing the canonical defs; record observations to governance_audit_log (no schema change); pin with per-gate unit tests + cohort-trigger + single-canonical-#4 + a compose/observe-only integration test; adversarially review before merge.
steps: author venture-intake-gates.js (G1-G6 + seam + isPackBinding + cohort count + record helper)
append G1/G3/G4->S3 and G2->S23/S25 bars in evaluateGateBars
add G5 CHECKS[7] + G6 filter in intake-bar.js (import canonical defs)
unit tests (per-gate, cohort, single-canonical-#4) + integration test (compose+observe-only)

smoke_test_steps.instruction: Run the gate-pack integration test that wires G1-G6 as observe-only onto S3/S5/S23/S25 + the Stage-1 intake bar
smoke_test_steps.expected_outcome: all six gates EVALUATE and RECORD observations to governance_audit_log but do NOT block/kill/promote any venture (observe-only), and the existing GATE-BAR-REGIME bars + intake-bar 7 criteria still fire (composition, not replacement)

smoke_test_steps.instruction: Grep the codebase for criterion #4 (G1 Distribution-Channel-First) gate definitions
smoke_test_steps.expected_outcome: exactly one canonical definition exists in lib/eva/venture-intake-gates.js — no Phase-1 doctrine duplicate

smoke_test_steps.instruction: Run the cohort-trigger unit test with cohort sizes 1, 2, and 3
smoke_test_steps.expected_outcome: isPackBinding returns false, false, true; the pack stays observe-only for cohort < 3 and is only eligible to bind at cohort >= 3 (binding still dormant this SD)

smoke_test_steps.instruction: Confirm the pack records via governance_audit_log with no schema change and the binding branch is dormant
smoke_test_steps.expected_outcome: observations written with changed_by='venture-intake-gates'; no new table/column/migration; INTAKE_GATES_OBSERVE_ONLY=true keeps the binding branch unreachable
